title: Ultra Realistic Cinematic Shot Stunning East Asian
sourceTitle: Ultra Realistic Cinematic Shot Stunning East Asian
prompt: An ultra-realistic, cinematic shot of a stunning East Asian woman styled as an ancient Chinese empress, lounging gracefully in a lavishly decorated palace courtyard at night. She is dressed in an exquisite, shimmering gold and champagne-colored silk hanfu robe with intricate floral embroidery, a strapless sweetheart bodice, and a metallic gold sash cinched at her waist. Her dark hair is styled in an elegant, voluminous updo, adorned with an elaborate golden phoenix crown, dangling tassels, and delicate hairpins. She wears a matching gold filigree necklace and long, ornate earrings, with a traditional red huadian forehead mark accentuating her features. The background is a breathtaking, softly blurred scene filled with warm, glowing paper lanterns, blooming cherry blossoms, and traditional wooden pavilions under a twilight sky, casting a warm, romantic, and ethereal golden light across the entire scene.
